src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the explicit @EnableZeebeClient annotation as it is likely no longer required or handled differently in the updated Spring Boot Camunda starter.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed '@EnableZeebeClient' annotation from the class declaration.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the exclusion of SecurityAutoConfiguration, implying that security auto-configuration is now desired or handled by default in the new setup.
Remove the custom OpenAPI bean definition for Swagger security schemes, likely because this configuration is now handled by the starter or is no longer needed.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed the 'swaggerOpenAPI()' @Bean method and associated imports.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace the original set of process variables (message, assignees, comments, file, date) with a new simplified set (businessKey, result) to align with updated business logic.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: private String businessKey; private Boolean result;

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove imports for List and Map which are no longer used after removing the corresponding fields from the class.
Remove dependency on Camunda Operate service and related DTOs to simplify the controller.
Remove the OperateService field and constructor injection since the service is no longer used.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed private final OperateService operateService; and its usage in the constructor.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the @CrossOrigin annotation from the controller class.
Change the base request mapping path from /api/process to /process.
Refactor the start process endpoint to use a fixed process ID constant and a typed variable object instead of a path variable and generic map.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Changed @PostMapping("/{bpmnProcessId}/start") to @PostMapping("/start") and replaced Map<String, Object> with ProcessVariables.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Use a constant for the BPMN process ID instead of passing it as a path variable.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Replaced bpmnProcessId variable with ProcessConstants.BPMN_PROCESS_ID in the command builder.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Change the publish message endpoint to accept a typed ProcessVariables object instead of a generic Map.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Changed @RequestBody Map<String, Object> variables to @RequestBody ProcessVariables variables.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove custom @IsAuthenticated annotations from controller methods.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed @IsAuthenticated annotations from startProcessInstance, publishMessage, and latestDefinitions methods.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the endpoint that retrieves latest process definitions from Operate.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Deleted the latestDefinitions() method and its associated logic.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove imports that are no longer used after refactoring the controller.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed imports for ArrayList, HashSet, List, Map, Set, and unused Spring annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.6 to 3.3.0, which requires Java 17+ and introduces Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Remove the spring-boot-starter-parent inheritance in favor of explicit dependency management to allow for a cleaner migration path.
Introduce explicit dependency management for Spring Boot and Zeebe BOMs to replace the parent POM's transitive management.
Replace the legacy zeebe-client-java and related protocol dependencies with the unified spring-boot-starter-camunda.
Migrate from springdoc-openapi-ui (Spring Boot 2.x) to springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui (Spring Boot 3.x).
Replace legacy spring-zeebe-test with the new spring-boot-starter-camunda-test for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Remove dependencies that are no longer part of the core solution or are handled by the new starter (e.g., Keycloak, JPA, Security, OkHttp).
pom.xml.human_impl: <!-- removed keycloak, jpa, security, okhttp, etc. -->

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly target Java 21 and enable parameter name retention.
Replace the spotify-fmt plugin with spotless-maven-plugin for modern code formatting support.
Remove the frontend-maven-plugin and associated React build steps, indicating a shift away from embedded frontend builds in this POM.
Remove the JDK 8-16 and JDK 17+ profiles since the project now strictly targets Java 21.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .envrc to gitignore to prevent committing local environment configurations.
Ignore generated release notes fetcher artifacts.
Ignore node_modules directory for end-to-end tests.
Remove gitignore entry for H2 database file, likely no longer used or managed differently.
Remove gitignore entries for React tasklist build artifacts and IDE files, likely removed from this repo.
Remove specific gitignore entry for .DS_Store in resources, likely covered by global ignore or no longer needed.

README.md.general_idea: Replace deprecated `docker-compose` command with the modern `docker compose` plugin syntax throughout the documentation.
Update the recommended local SMTP testing tool from MailHog to Mailpit in the documentation.
Update Web Modeler self-managed setup instructions to use the standard compose file instead of the beta-specific one.
Update the git reference for building the Keycloak image on ARM64 to point to a specific stable release tag.
Add documentation for enabling and configuring Zeebe GRPC authentication via environment variables.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Securing the Zeebe API' with ZEEBE_AUTHENTICATION_MODE=identity

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for enabling resource-based authorizations in Operate and Tasklist.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Resource based authorizations' with RESOURCE_AUTHORIZATIONS_ENABLED=true

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for enabling multi-tenancy support in the platform.
Add a dedicated section for the Desktop Modeler with deployment instructions for local Zeebe instances.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Desktop Modeler' with OAuth and None auth settings

README.md.general_idea: Restructure the README to remove low-code specific content and align with the standard Process Solution Template.
README.md.human_impl: Removed 'Low-code Solution Template' title and React/Form-js specific sections

docker-compose.yaml.general_idea: Removed hardcoded default versions from image tags to enforce explicit version management via environment variables.
Exposed the Zeebe REST API port to support newer client interactions and health checks.
Added environment variables to enable Identity-based authentication and multi-tenancy in Zeebe.
Added a TCP-based health check for the Zeebe gateway port to ensure service readiness.
Added Identity as a dependency for Zeebe to support authentication flows.
Updated Operate configuration to use Identity for authentication, including client credentials and issuer URLs.
Added a Spring Boot Actuator-based health check for Operate.
Added a volume for Operate's temporary directory to support token caching.
Updated Tasklist configuration to use Identity for authentication and added REST address configuration.
Added a Spring Boot Actuator-based health check for Tasklist.
Added a volume for Tasklist's temporary directory to support token caching.
Updated Tasklist dependencies to require healthy states of Zeebe, Elasticsearch, and Identity.
Added Identity authentication configuration and exposed ports for the Connectors bundle.
Added a Spring Boot Actuator-based health check for Connectors.
Added Operate and Identity as dependencies for Connectors.
Updated Optimize configuration to use Identity for authentication and added multi-tenancy support.
Added a custom API-based health check for Optimize.
Added explicit database connection details for Identity to connect to PostgreSQL.
Updated Keycloak initialization URLs to use a host variable instead of localhost for better network compatibility.
Added Keycloak client initialization for Connectors.
Added Keycloak client initialization for Zeebe with specific permissions.
Changed Identity health check to use wget and target the correct port.
Added the camunda-platform network to the Identity service.
Added the camunda-platform network to the Keycloak service.
Defined new volumes for Operate and Tasklist temporary directories.

src/main/resources/models/camunda-proces.general_idea: Replace a complex multi-task workflow with embedded forms and parallel gateways with a minimal single service task process.
src/main/resources/models/camunda-proces.human_impl: Removed user tasks, send tasks, and parallel gateways; kept only StartEvent -> ServiceTask -> EndEvent.

src/main/resources/models/camunda-proces.general_idea: Change the service task type from 'selectAssignee' to 'invokeMyService' to match the simplified process logic.
Update the BPMN exporter metadata to reflect the use of Camunda Modeler instead of Camunda Web Modeler.
src/main/resources/models/camunda-proces.human_impl: Changed exporter attribute to 'Camunda Modeler' and updated version string.
